creator: sada@ail-inc.co.jp
text:
I've applied patches to the Netscape browsers' ports.
	These will work as
		* do ``pkg_delete'' complete
		* make package and ``pkg_install'' correct.
	Patches are for ``pkg/PLIST'' files.

Fix: for netscape-3.04/pkg/PLIST
-
-

for netscape-navigator-4.04/pkg/PLIST
-
-

for netscape-communicator-4.04/pkg/PLIST
-
